regions.text: Modern factories use automatic controls. The Assembly Line lets us make things like automobiles much more cheaply.
(Diagram: Workers and machines at a moving assembly line). Each part of the process depends on the one before it.
Assembly lines are parts of an overall design. By using machines, we can free up people's time. What should we do with this new free time?
free: to make free. FUTURE: will free. PRESENT: free(s). PAST: freed.
